description:
ICICI Prudential  iProtect Return of Premium provides security to you and your loved ones against all such eventualities, safeguards your future planning while simultaneously also ensuring that you get a survival/maturity benefit.
This plan understands that change is the only constant and changes with your changing needs. 

In this video, we have discussed 3 Options available in ICICI Prudential  iProtect Return of Premium  , Sum Assured , Eligibility Criteria & all the important features in an easy to understand language.

WATCH THE VIDEO FOR MORE DETAILS 😊

✅ To buy insurance policies, click here - https://hareepatti.com/contact-us/

✅ ICICI Prudential  iProtect Return of Premium Brochure : https://www.iciciprulife.com/content/dam/icicipru/brochures/ICICI_Pru_iProtect_Return_of_Premium_Brochure.pdf

✅ TIME STAMPS
0:00  Introduction
0:50  3 Variants of ICICI Prudential iProtect Return of Premium
1:50  Level Cover With Return of Premium ( Option 1 )
3:22  Example of Level Cover With Return of Premium
4:14  Life stage cover with Return of Premium ( Option 2 )
5:56  Example of Life stage cover with Return of Premium 
8:42  Life Stage Cover with Early Return of premium ( Option 3 )
9:30  Example Life Stage Cover with Early Return of premium
10:33 Example with ROP at 60 years
11:40  Riders in ICICI Prudential iProtect Return of Premium
15:00  Premium Calculation with Riders
16:14  Underwriting guidelines of ICICI Prudential iProtect Return of Premium

comments.text:
Thanks for such an explanatory video..
Appreciate your real time examples. I have seen two types of  term insurance plans by icici PRU, one is normal one (iprotect smart) and other is iprotect return of premiums, I am 33 years old which plan is good to go for ? As I can see return of premium is good option to go for because I can get my premiums back on survival which is not the case with iprotect smart,  then why anyone will opt for such term insurance plan which doesn't returns premium.
comments.author: @shobhitpal1988

comments.text:
Shobhit jee, its a personal choice. Lot of people buy term insurance without return of premium as premium is lower and purpose is to get pure insurance and not return on premium paid.

It is a choice based on your thought process and what is more comfortable
comments.author: @GurleenKaurTikku
